page_metadata.biotools__summary: A online database dbCAN-seq to provide pre-computed carbohydrate-active enzyme (CAZymes) sequence and annotation data for 5,349 bacterial genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A online database dbCAN-seq to provide pre-computed carbohydrate-active enzyme (CAZymes) sequence and annotation data for 5,349 bacterial genomes.
